properties.name: Triton Square
properties.details: Pricing increased significantly. Previous: Studio/1BR ~$1,930/mo. Current: Studio $2,335/mo, 1BR $2,585-$2,634/mo (↑$405-655). Site accessible but prices JS-rendered.

properties.name: Pleasant Valley
properties.details: G5 platform confirms prices unchanged. Studio $1,870/mo, 1BR $2,085/mo. No special active.

properties.name: Harbor Heights (Enclave)
properties.details: Webflow page loads, prices JS-rendered. No new data. Stored: 1BR ~$2,400/mo, 2BR ~$3,500/mo.

properties.name: Harbor Heights (Beacon)
properties.details: Minor adjustment at price floor. Previous 1BR min $2,395, now $2,320/mo per ApartmentList (↓$75). Range $2,320-$2,494/mo. 2BR unchanged.

properties.name: Waterford Woods
properties.details: Wix site still JS-inaccessible. Aggregators confirm $1,654-$2,725/mo range. Previous stored $1,855 average - no significant change.

properties.name: Groton Estates
properties.details: grotonestates.com now redirects to Rocky Hill CT (Kelson Row). Groton location data unavailable. Stored prices from prior run remain: 2BR $1,775-$2,210/mo.

properties.name: Chester Place
properties.details: b7 site confirms $1,845/mo. No $500 special active. Same as stored.

properties.name: Emerson Place
properties.details: b7 site confirms 1BR $1,895/mo, Corner $1,995/mo, 2BR $2,345/mo. Same as stored.

properties.name: The Ledges
properties.details: Site timeout (Cloudflare). ApartmentList confirms 1BR floor increased from $2,052 to $2,075/mo (↑$23). No special active.

properties.name: Gull Harbor
properties.details: gullharborct.com/floorplans returns 404. Homepage still live. Aggregators confirm 1BR $1,695/mo - price unchanged but floorplans URL broken.
